plain_language_answer: PB1_total_hA_heater_power_drive_p1 has already been scored in coupled M3+TS+cooler form, and local test-section/distribution behavior has been assessed separately. The blocker stays open: PB1/PB2/PB3 improve mdot but fail temperature-field gates, and TS6/TS7 fail local test-section heat gates.
